mapper.insert: INSERT INTO book_pages (id, book_id, activity_id, page_type, page_order, skeleton_id, skeleton_key, skeleton_version, template_id, slots, layout_mode, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{bookId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{activityId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{pageType}, #{pageOrder}, #{skeletonId}, #{skeletonKey}, #{skeletonVersion}, #{templateId,javaType=java.util.UUID,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{slots}::jsonb, COALESCE(#{layoutMode}, 'skeleton'), NOW(), NOW())
